behavior_summary: U8P_DARTBORD::look is a simple object 'U8P_DARTBORD::look' (examine) handler that displays a single short description to the player: the bark 'dart board'.
Immediately after showing the description the process issues a suspend, which appears to yield or pause the U8P_DARTBORD::look process (likely to let the message be shown before returning control).
No global flags, parameters, local variables, helper functions, or external calls are observed in this snippet — behavior is purely descriptive and self-contained.

There is no branching, menu interaction, or external invocation present in the available code.
